category_sources: source_facts.description says mongo-c-driver is a C driver for MongoDB; official repository calls it the official MongoDB driver for C.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies the C driver for MongoDB; official repository title uses mongo-c-driver and describes the official MongoDB C driver.
docs_sources: Official mongo-c-driver README points to MongoDB C Driver Docs and mongoc.org for documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-c-driver, so repo is null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says C driver for MongoDB; official README describes libmongoc and libbson libraries.
